overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity showing an 18th-century assassin approaching Notre-Dame Cathedral, climbing its facade, and entering the gothic interior. The sequence transitions from a sunlit cobblestone plaza to the ornate stained-glass interior with stealth gameplay.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the cathedral entrance across the cobblestone plaza

notable_agents.action: standing near the cathedral entrance wearing light-colored clothing

entered.detail: large stone cathedral with twin towers and rose window
historic stone buildings adjacent to the cathedral
historic stone buildings adjacent to the cathedral
ground surface with scattered debris and hay piles

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide cobblestone plaza toward the imposing Gothic facade of Notre-Dame Cathedral. The morning sun illuminates the stone architecture while a few NPCs stand near the entrance.

events.description: character transitions from walking to climbing up the cathedral wall

agents.ego_description: climbing up the cathedral facade using architectural ledges and stone columns

entered.detail: large circular stained glass window on cathedral facade
stone gargoyle protruding from the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character begins climbing the cathedral facade, moving from the ground level up the stone walls. The camera follows the ascent past gargoyles and ledges toward the rose window and upper balconies.

events.description: character enters the cathedral interior from the exterior balcony
lighting shifts from bright exterior to dim interior corridor

agents.ego_description: entering the cathedral through a side doorway and moving through a narrow stone passage

entered.detail: heavy wooden door leading into the cathedral
narrow passage with stone walls and dim lighting

segments.scene_description: The character enters the cathedral through a wooden doorway, transitioning from the bright exterior to a dimly lit stone corridor. The environment shifts from open sky to enclosed interior architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral nave with stained glass windows

events.description: emerging into main hall with colorful light patterns from stained glass windows
character crouches and takes cover behind wooden railings

agents.ego_description: moving stealthily through the cathedral interior, taking cover behind wooden railings and observing a distant figure

notable_agents.action: standing near a smoking brazier in the distance, facing away from the player

entered.detail: tall gothic windows casting blue and red colored light patterns across the floor
blue fabric banner with gold fleur-de-lis hanging from the railing
large iron chandeliers suspended from the vaulted ceiling
high arched ceiling with ribbed gothic architecture

segments.scene_description: Inside the grand cathedral nave, colorful light streams through stained glass windows illuminating the ornate interior. The character moves stealthily along wooden railings, taking cover while observing a distant NPC near a smoking brazier. The camera pans up to reveal the magnificent vaulted ceiling and hanging chandeliers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open city plaza into the atmospheric, shadowed depths of a Gothic cathedral. It begins with a walk across a wide cobblestone plaza toward the imposing facade of Notre-Dame under the morning sun. As the character begins to climb, the camera follows the ascent up the stone walls, passing gargoyles and ledges toward the rose window and upper balconies. The scene then shifts from the open sky to an enclosed interior as the character enters through a wooden doorway into a dimly lit stone corridor. Finally, the environment opens into the grand nave where colorful light streams through stained glass, moving stealthily along wooden railings before the camera pans up to reveal the vaulted ceiling and hanging chandeliers.
